---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working right in the game
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Do '...'
3. See the problem

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15, desktop]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 18, macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Browser + version: [e.g. Safari 18, Chrome 126]
- Input mode: [camera / mouse-touch]

**Console errors**
Paste anything from the browser devtools console, if available.

**Screenshots / clips**
If it helps, attach a screenshot or short recording.
